titleStmt.title: SII 18.372: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 372. (B.K. No. 178 of 1932-33.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the southern gōpura of the Vīranārāyaṇasvāmi temple.

summary.p: This inscription of about the 12-13th century A.D., states that Mahāpradhāna Mahadēva, a follower of the Jaina faith, renovated the Jina-bhavana. He is called the pradhāna of Ekkala-bhūpāla of the town of Uddhare and Ekkaladēvana rājyābhyudaya-karaṇa-kāraṇa (the cause of the rise of Ekkaladēva's kingdom). The genealogy of Mahadēva is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kalidēvasvāmiyādī jinabhavanamahāmaṁṭapamaṁ māḍisalu
muṁ palarggaṁ koḷvāgadaṁtaṁtarisiralanavadyātmakaṁ dā
nadoḻu meygali jīrṇnōddhāramaṁ māḍisidanena
lidēṁ dhaṁnyanō peṁpuvettekkalabhūpāḷapradhānaṁ
budhanidhi mahadēvaṁ jagatsēvya bhabyaṁ . paravadhu raṁbhega ra
tigavaggaḷavōpuvaḍaṁ parārtthavīsvara sakhanartthadiṁ varuṇana
rtthadinurjjitavāgi bappaḍa ṁ paranripanoldumaṁnisuvaḍaṁThe letter ḍa is written above the line.
piridīvaḍavatta cittavōsarisadidēṁ mahatvado
davo mahiyoḷu mahadēvamaṁtriya . maṟasidarārttha
maṁ meṟevamēḷisi porddi parāṁganāratakkeṟaguva naṁbidāḷvaniva matte
patitvamanāsegeydu bēsaṟinusirvvaṁnyamaṁtrinikarakkadaṭiṁ toḍari
kkidaṁ gaḍēnaṟiyire sāmivaṁcakara gaṁḍananī mahadēvamaṁtriyaṁ . śrī
manmahāpradhānaṁ puruṣanidhānaṁ sōmalavēvi jaṭharajāhnavīsamudbhūtaṁ
saucagāṁgēya Aṇubratācaraṇaniyamāga(ṁ)ṇyapu(ṁ)ṇya
kāyanuṁ nikhiḷasameyasayutpāṭanaprakaṭīkṛtajñānānūnapaṁtōṣasa
mullasitaṣaṭṭaraṇanuṁ jinasameyasamuddharaṇapariṇatāṁtaḥ
karaṇanuṁ bhuvanavinuta bhavarahita jinabhavanavinirmmāpaṇōdvri
ttacittanityāhlādanuṁ Āhārābhayabhaiśajyasāstravinōdanuṁ triśa
kticaturupāya paṁcāgamaṁtra sāḍgu saptāṁga bāhattariniyōgādiSome letters seem to have been omitted here.
nikhiḷarājanītikhyāta brihaspatiyuṁ [U]ktabhukte saṁyukta sajjanamanōhlādasaṁbha
vi bhava�tiyuṁ maṁḍaḷikagaṁḍabhēruṁḍanenipuddhareyapuradekkaladēvana ryājyābhyu
dayakaraṇakāraṇakēḷīdhuraṁdharanuṁ parahitacarita niravadyavidhyādharanuṁ
sāmivaṁcakara gaṁḍanuṁ nikhiḷaguṇagaṇakaraṁḍanuṁ paranārīsahōdaranuṁ
sāhasavrikōdaranumenipa mahadēvadaṁḍanāthana mahatvamaṁ pēḷvaḍe . negaḷdaṁ sā
sāman�niṁ baṁbaḷikamavaniyoḷu gaṁgapayya pradhānaṁ negaḷdaṁ mattātaniṁndaṁ
ḷdananupamaṁ rēcaṇadaṁḍēsanalliṁ negaḷdaṁ daṁḍādhināthaṁ budhanidhi mahadēvaṁ ma haudā
ryyasīḷaṁ jagadoḷu skatkīrtikāntaṁ jinabhavanavinirmmāpaṇōtkaṁṭhacittaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
